title: miles's Enchanted Books
description: This texture pack give mineral or gem trims for books enchantments. It's basically Visual Enchantments but thematic.
body:
[![Alt text](https://imgur.com/KT1FF2S.png)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/milesdemillas/projects)

<center>

Greetings, This texture pack give mineral or gem trims for **books** enchantments. It's basically Visual Enchantments but thematic.  
### This texture pack requires **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** or **[CIT Resewn](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn)**.  
And make sure your configs are set corretly:  
Option/Video Setting/Quality/Custom Item: **ON**  
**Works on 1.20 and below versions.**
 
**Designs**  
![Alt text](https://imgur.com/aCXEj2q.png)

</center>

**FREQUENT ISSUES**  
Other packets may interfere.  
The texture pack may not work with unofficial clients.

##### You can see previews or give me suggestions of my texture packs through [Twitter](https://twitter.com/milesdemillas_)
